predmicror 1.3.1.9000

  • Changelog

Package index

Fitting wrappers

Convenience wrappers for fitting and discovering predictive microbiology models.

fit_growth()
Fit a primary growth model
fit_inactivation()
Fit a microbial inactivation model
fit_cardinal()
Fit a cardinal parameter model
predmicror_models()
List models available through the fitting wrappers

Omnibus modelling

Nonlinear mixed-effects omnibus models using predmicror primary models and secondary covariate formulas.

fit_omnibus() fit_omnibus_growth() fit_omnibus_inactivation()
Fit omnibus predictive microbiology models
validate_omnibus_leave_one_out()
Validate an omnibus fit by leaving out one group
bias_factor() accuracy_factor()
Bias and accuracy factors
print(<predmicror_omnibus_fit>) summary(<predmicror_omnibus_fit>) coef(<predmicror_omnibus_fit>) fitted(<predmicror_omnibus_fit>) residuals(<predmicror_omnibus_fit>) predict(<predmicror_omnibus_fit>) logLik(<predmicror_omnibus_fit>) AIC(<predmicror_omnibus_fit>) BIC(<predmicror_omnibus_fit>)
Methods for omnibus fits

Model diagnostics and comparison

Helpers for extracting fitted values, calculating metrics, and comparing fitted models.

predmicror_augment() as.data.frame(<predmicror_fit>)
Extract fitted values and residuals from a predmicror fit
fit_metrics()
Calculate model diagnostics for a fitted predmicror model
compare_models()
Compare fitted predmicror models
print(<predmicror_fit>) summary(<predmicror_fit>) predict(<predmicror_fit>) plot(<predmicror_fit>) coef(<predmicror_fit>) fitted(<predmicror_fit>) residuals(<predmicror_fit>) vcov(<predmicror_fit>) logLik(<predmicror_fit>) AIC(<predmicror_fit>) BIC(<predmicror_fit>)
Methods for predmicror_fit objects

Full growth models

Functions for fitting full growth models.

BaranyiFM()
Baranyi and Roberts full growth model
HuangFM()
Huang full growth model
RossoFM()
Rosso full growth model
ZwieteringFM()
Zwietering full growth model

No lag growth models

Functions for fitting no lag growth models.

FangNLM()
Fang no lag growth model
HuangNLM()
Huang no lag growth model
RichardsNLM()
Richards no lag growth model

Reduced growth models

Functions for fitting reduced growth models.

BaranyiRM()
Baranyi and Roberts reduced growth model
BuchananRM()
Buchanan reduced growth model
HuangRM()
Huang reduced growth model

Inactivation models

Functions for fitting inactivation models.

HuangRGS()
Huang reparameterized Gompertz survival model
WeibullM()
Weibull inactivation model Mafart
WeibullMM()
Weibull inactivation modified model Mafart
WeibullPH()
Weibull inactivation model Peleg and Huang
GeeraerdST()
Geeraerd inactivation model

Cardinal models

Functions for fitting cardinal models.

CMTI()
Cardinal model for temperature
CMPH()
Cardinal model for pH
CMAW()
Cardinal model for water activity
CMInh()
Cardinal model for growth inhibitors

Datasets

Datasets of example data.

aw
Data of aw
bixina
Data concerning Staphylococcus aureus microbial inactivation in beef
growthfull
Data of a complete curve of microbial growth
growthnolag
Data of a no lag curve of microbial growth
growthred
Data of a reduced curve of microbial growth
inh
Data of INH antimicrobials
ph
Data pH
salmonella
Potential growth of Salmonella typhimurium on cooked chicken
mafart2005Li11
Data of microbial inactivation Albert and Mafart (2005)

Dynamic models

Dynamic prediction and sensitivity tools for changing environmental profiles.

dynamic_profile()
Create a dynamic environmental profile
predict_dynamic_growth()
Predict microbial growth under dynamic environmental conditions
predict_dynamic_inactivation()
Predict microbial inactivation under dynamic environmental conditions
fit_dynamic_growth()
Fit dynamic microbial growth models
fit_dynamic_inactivation()
Fit dynamic microbial inactivation models
dynamic_sensitivity()
Finite-difference sensitivity for dynamic predictions

Assistant

Local helper for using predmicror.

predmicror_assistant()
Assistant for predmicror
predmicror_assistant_app()
Launch the predmicror assistant Shiny app

On this page

Developed by Vasco Cadavez, Ursula Gonzales-Barron.
